streams.attendance_notes: No specific attendance data recorded yet.
successful_bundle_formats: Simple bundle structures preferred — too many bundle types slow streams down
streams.giveaway_notes: Giveaways are a community building tool, not a revenue driver.
streams.pricing_notes: Low-AOV flat-fee risk on Whatnot matters, especially around £1–£2 hammer prices.
streams.pacing_notes: Keep bundle types simple. Default should be simple bundle structures.
lessons_learned: Too many bundle types slow streams down. Default to simple structures.
Mega Dream JP is a strong stream anchor due to guaranteed-hit style appeal.
